mission_title: Repair Bay V1.2 — Launcher Map and Protected Baseline

argv: from pathlib import Path;files=[Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\repair_bay_diagnostics.py'),Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\VERIFY_REPAIR_BAY_V1.py')];[compile(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'),str(p),'exec') for p in files];print('REPAIR_BAY_V1_2_SOURCE_COMPILE_OK')
validations.name: Compile Repair Bay V1.2 sources without writing bytecode
Verify launcher content map, relationships, protected baseline, and read-only behavior

argv: import json,sys;sys.path.insert(0,r'Z:\FOXAI');from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;r=run_repair_bay_scan(r'Z:\FOXAI',mode='full',context={'validation':'v1_2_live_launcher_map_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('version')=='1.2',r.get('version');assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;inv=(r.get('evidence') or {}).get('launcher_inventory') or {};assert int(inv.get('total') or 0)>=1,inv;items=inv.get('items') or [];assert len(items)==int(inv.get('total') or 0),(len(items),inv.get('total'));assert all('purpose' in item and 'entry_point_status' in item for item in items);baseline=inv.get('protected_baseline') or {};root_protected=baseline.get('root') or [];assert any(item.get('name')=='START_FOXAI_WEB_WITH_COMFYUI.bat' for item in root_protected),root_protected;assert any(item.get('name')=='START_FOXAI_DESKTOP_TWO_WINDOW_RECOVERY.bat' for item in root_protected),root_protected;external=baseline.get('external') or [];assert any(item.get('role')=='kayocks_study_start' and item.get('present') for item in external),external;archive=inv.get('archive_plan') or {};assert archive.get('status')=='proposal_only',archive;assert int(archive.get('changes_applied') or 0)==0,archive;assert archive.get('delete_allowed') is False,archive;assert archive.get('move_allowed') is False,archive;assert archive.get('rename_allowed') is False,archive;protected_names={item.get('name') for item in root_protected};candidate_names={item.get('name') for item in (inv.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or [])};assert not protected_names.intersection(candidate_names),(protected_names,candidate_names);print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V1_2_LIVE_OK':True,'checks':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('checks'),'launcher_total':inv.get('total'),'protected_root':len(root_protected),'relationships':len(inv.get('relationship_edges') or []),'receipt_backed':len(inv.get('receipt_backed') or []),'archive_candidates':len(inv.get('obsolete_looking_candidates') or []),'unresolved':len(inv.get('unresolved_items') or [])},indent=2))
